notes:
- Fleet Ops go LIVE: share a crew-board link and watch ships and seats fill in real time.
- Op lifecycle: Planning (setup) / Active (live, claimable) / Ended (frozen final board).
- Share read-only op economics and payout with crew - you choose what's visible.
- Custom seats: add, rename, remove seats on any op ship.
- Payout from an op auto-links it and can add the whole op crew in one tap.
- Rock Breaker: verdict is its own panel + a gadget on/off toggle.
- UEX prices refresh automatically (about every 6h); manual refresh removed.
- Fixes: 'Payout saved' banners no longer stick; ended ops read clearly.
